steps.input: Identify key clause categories: liability, indemnification, termination, payment
steps.output: Contract structure analyzed. 4 clause categories identified with 23 total clauses. Read-only access confirmed.

steps.input: Extract summaries of risk-relevant clauses. Full clause text must not leave governed environment.
steps.output: Extracted 8 risk-relevant clause summaries. Liability cap: $5M. Indemnification: mutual. Termination: 30-day notice. Full text retained in governed environment only.

governance.reason: Clause extraction requested. Policy restricts output to summaries only. Full clause text blocked from export.
conditions: Only summary-length extractions permitted in output

steps.input: Verify no full clause text in extraction output
steps.output: Data governance check passed. All outputs are summary-length (under 50 words per clause). No full clause text detected in output payload.

governance.reason: Output validation is a read-only compliance check.
